info.title: Google Drive API
info.description: Access and manage files in Google Drive. Requires OAuth2 with drive.readonly or drive scope.

scopes.https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.fi: Access files created by this app

get.summary: List files and folders in Google Drive
get.description: List files and folders stored in Google Drive (cloud storage). Use this for any question about Google Drive files, documents, spreadsheets, or folders. IMPORTANT: the search parameter is named 'q' (not 'query'). To find PDFs use q="mimeType='application/pdf'". Returns file IDs, names, MIME types, and modified times.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Drive search query — parameter name is 'q'. Use Drive query syntax (NOT SQL or natural language). PDF files: mimeType='application/pdf'. Folders: mimeType='application/vnd.google-apps.folder'. Google Docs: mimeType='application/vnd.google-apps.document'. Name search: name contains 'report'. Combined: mimeType='application/pdf' and trashed=false. Note: 'name ends with' is NOT valid — use mimeType for file type filtering.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of files to return (1-1000, default 100)

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Token for the next page of results, from a previous call's nextPageToken

parameters.name: spaces
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of spaces to query: drive, appDataFolder, photos

200.description: List of files matching the query

get.summary: Get a file from Google Drive
get.description: Get metadata or download content of a Google Drive file or document. Use alt=media to download the file content. Use fields to specify which metadata to return.

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: The ID of the file. Get IDs from listFiles.

parameters.name: alt
parameters.description: Use 'media' to download the file content instead of metadata

delete.summary: Delete a file from Google Drive
delete.description: Permanently deletes a file from Google Drive. Use with caution — this cannot be undone.

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: The ID of the file to delete

get.description: Exports a Google Docs, Sheets, or Slides file to a standard format. Use mimeType to specify the export format.

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: The ID of the Google Workspace file to export

parameters.name: mimeType
parameters.description: The MIME type to export to. Docs→'text/plain' or 'application/pdf'; Sheets→'text/csv'; Slides→'application/pdf'

get.summary: Get Drive storage quota and user info
get.description: Returns information about the user's Drive storage quota (used, total) and their account details.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Fields to return. Use "user,storageQuota" to get account info and quota.

200.description: Drive account info and storage quota

get.description: Returns the list of sharing permissions for a file or folder, including who has access and their role.

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: The ID of the file or folder

get.summary: List recent changes to files in Drive
get.description: Returns a list of recent changes to files in the user's Drive. Requires a pageToken from getStartPageToken.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: The token for continuing a previous list request or use getStartPageToken to start fresh
